title: PrototypeOutput
description: Structured return from prototype-runner agent (Stage 6.5 — conditional empirical validation of design constants).

doc_path.description: Absolute path to the produced prototype-report.md.

constants_tested.description: Each numeric design constant tested empirically.

verdict.description: PROTOTYPE_OK when all constants are within tolerance; PROTOTYPE_FAILED when one or more are out of tolerance and the spec must pivot.

failing_constants.description: Names of constants that failed validation. Empty when verdict='PROTOTYPE_OK'.
